name: Ambrosia Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Note: Suggested fruits include bananas, seedless green and red grapes, kiwifruit, canned mandarin-orange slices, strawberries, etc. Chocolate pieces should be melted.
1. Day before serving: Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. In a medium bowl, combine coconut, almonds and butter; mix well. Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake until golden brown, about 15 minutes. Cool.
2. In a large bowl of electric mixer, beat cream cheese, sugar, flour, orange peel and vanilla at high speed until fluffy. Beat in apricot nectar and cream of coconut. Add eggs one at a time until blended. Stir in pineapple; pour into the prepared crust. Bake for 1 hour and 10 minutes or until set. Cool on a wire rack; refrigerate overnight.
3. Just before serving, arrange fruit over top of cake. Melt 1 teaspoon shortening into each melted semisweet and white chocolates until blended. Place each mixture in a separate small pastry bag fitted with a small plain tip; pipe over the fruit.
